title: Webinar: monday CRM for SMB's!

posts.author: larslodewijckx (Lars Lodewijckx)
posts.cookedHtml:
Why SMBs Thrive with monday CRM – Join Our Webinar hosted by monday.com’s CRM Sales Manager Gabriela Weingartner and Xebia!

Small and medium-sized businesses need a CRM that’s flexible, scalable, and built to support their unique workflows—not one that forces them into a rigid structure. That’s why so many SMBs are thriving with monday CRM!

Join us on March 12 at 3 PM CET for an exclusive webinar where we’ll explore:
How SMBs can streamline their sales and customer management with monday CRM
The power of customization to adapt to your business needs
Real-life examples of SMBs successfully using monday CRM beyond just sales

Save your spot now! → monday.com CRM for Small & Medium Sized Business - Webinar 2025

See you there!
